title: Add Agent Hub SDK dependency and agent_slug support
objective: Properly declare agent-hub-client SDK dependency and add agent_slug parameter to all Agent Hub completion calls for agent-specific configs, mandate injection, and fallback chains
spirit_anti: SPIRIT: Formalize SDK dependency and enable agent-specific routing with proper slugs for each agent type. ANTI: Continue with dev-mode SDK installation, missing agent_slug benefits (configs, mandates, fallbacks, tracking).
done_when: agent-hub-client SDK declared in backend/pyproject.toml dependencies
All 9 agent invocation points pass agent_slug parameter
Backend deploys successfully with SDK installed from PyPI or local path
Type checking passes with proper agent_hub imports
All agents identified with meaningful slugs (discovery, portfolio_analyzer, strategy_reviewer, etc.)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: agent-hub-client SDK is declared in pyproject.toml dependencies with file URL
All agent instantiations pass agent_slug to client
acceptance_criteria.verify_command: rg 'agent_slug=' backend/app/agents backend/app/services backend/app/tasks --type py | wc -l

acceptance_criteria.criterion: mypy ignores for agent_hub are removed from pyproject.toml
acceptance_criteria.verify_command: rg -q 'module.*agent_hub.*ignore_missing_imports' backend/pyproject.toml && echo 'Still has ignores' || echo 'Ignores removed'

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Type checking passes with agent_hub imports
acceptance_criteria.verify_command: cd backend && .venv/bin/mypy app/agents/clients/agent_hub_client.py --strict 2>&1 | rg -q 'Success: no issues found' && echo 'Types pass'

subtasks.description: Add agent-hub-client SDK to pyproject.toml dependencies

steps.description: Add agent-hub-client file URL to pyproject.toml dependencies array
steps.verify_command: rg -q 'agent-hub-client.*file://' backend/pyproject.toml && echo 'SDK added to dependencies'

steps.description: Add allow-direct-references = true to tool.setuptools section
steps.verify_command: rg -q 'allow-direct-references.*true|allow_direct_references.*true' backend/pyproject.toml && echo 'Direct references enabled' || echo 'Not needed for setuptools (only hatch needs this)'
steps.expected_output: Not needed for setuptools (only hatch needs this)

steps.description: Remove agent_hub mypy ignore overrides from pyproject.toml
steps.verify_command: rg 'agent_hub.*ignore_missing_imports' backend/pyproject.toml && echo 'Still has ignores' || echo 'Ignores removed'

steps.description: Install SDK in development environment
steps.verify_command: cd backend && .venv/bin/pip show agent-hub-client 2>&1 | rg -q 'Name: agent-hub-client' && echo 'SDK installed'

steps.description: Deploy backend changes

subtasks.description: Add agent_slug parameter to AgentHubAPIClient.generate() method

steps.description: Add agent_slug parameter to generate() method signature
Pass agent_slug to SDK client.complete() call
Verify type checking passes for agent_hub_client.py
steps.verify_command: cd backend && .venv/bin/mypy app/agents/clients/agent_hub_client.py --strict 2>&1 | rg -q 'Success: no issues found' && echo 'Types pass'

steps.description: Deploy backend changes

subtasks.description: Add agent_slug to Discovery Agent and Portfolio Analyzer Agent invocations

steps.description: Update DiscoveryAgent to pass agent_slug='discovery' to llm_client
steps.verify_command: rg 'agent_slug.*discovery' backend/app/agents/discovery.py && echo 'Discovery slug added' || rg 'class DiscoveryAgent' backend/app/agents/discovery.py

steps.description: Update PortfolioAnalyzerAgent to pass agent_slug='portfolio_analyzer'
steps.verify_command: rg 'agent_slug.*portfolio_analyzer' backend/app/agents/portfolio_analyzer.py && echo 'Portfolio slug added' || rg 'class PortfolioAnalyzerAgent' backend/app/agents/portfolio_analyzer.py

steps.description: Update agent_tasks.py celery tasks to pass agent_slug to agents
Deploy backend changes

subtasks.description: Add agent_slug to StrategyReviewer and MultiReviewer agent invocations

steps.description: Update StrategyReviewer to pass agent_slug='strategy_reviewer' when creating clients
steps.verify_command: rg 'agent_slug.*strategy_reviewer' backend/app/agents/strategy_reviewer.py && echo 'Strategy reviewer slug added' || rg 'AgentHubAPIClient' backend/app/agents/strategy_reviewer.py

steps.description: Update MultiReviewer to pass agent_slug='multi_reviewer_gemini' and 'multi_reviewer_claude'
Deploy backend changes

subtasks.description: Add agent_slug to StrategyEvolutionAgent and service invocations

steps.description: Update StrategyEvolutionAgent to pass agent_slug='strategy_evolution'
Update CrossValidationService to pass agent_slug='cross_validator_gemini' and 'cross_validator_claude'
Update ThesisService to pass agent_slug='thesis_generator' and 'thesis_validator'
Deploy backend changes

subtasks.description: Add agent_slug to workflow task invocations

steps.description: Update DualProviderClient in llm_client.py to accept and pass agent_slug
steps.verify_command: rg 'def generate\(' backend/app/agents/llm_client.py -A 8 | rg -q 'agent_slug' && echo 'DualProviderClient updated'

steps.description: Update workflow_tasks.py to pass agent_slug='gap_analysis' to client.generate()
steps.verify_command: rg 'agent_slug.*gap_analysis' backend/app/tasks/workflow_tasks.py && echo 'Workflow slug added' || rg 'client.generate' backend/app/tasks/workflow_tasks.py

steps.description: Deploy backend changes

subtasks.description: Verify all agent_slug parameters are in place and type checking passes

steps.description: Count all agent_slug usages across codebase
steps.verify_command: rg 'agent_slug=' backend/app/agents backend/app/services backend/app/tasks --type py | wc -l

steps.description: Verify SDK is properly installed and importable
steps.verify_command: cd backend && .venv/bin/python -c 'from agent_hub import AgentHubClient; print("Import successful")' 2>&1

steps.description: Run type checking on all agent modules
steps.verify_command: cd backend && .venv/bin/mypy app/agents/ --strict 2>&1 | rg -q 'Success: no issues found' && echo 'All types pass'

steps.description: Verify backend health endpoint returns 200 with agent_slug changes
